title: Vibrant Archwood Logs
description: Texture recolor for Archwood Logs from Ars Nouveau mod.
body:
This is a resource pack for [_Ars Nouveau_](https://modrinth.com/mod/ars-nouveau) mod made by [**baileyholl**](https://modrinth.com/user/baileyholl). It changes Archwood log textures to make them fit better with the leaves textures, and so with that, be more vibrant.

Below, the comparison:
![Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c539fa0adfdb1ee6e5f2241047e4cba680477f71.png)
